2604.27891.title: In-Context Prompting Obsoletes Agent Orchestration for Procedural Tasks
2604.27891.paper_summary: Agent orchestration frameworks -- LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, and others -- place an external orchestrator above the LLM, tracking state and injecting routing instructions at every turn. We present a controlled comparison showing that for procedural tasks, this architecture is dominated by a simpler alternative: putting the entire procedure in the system prompt and letting the model self-orchestrate. Across three domains -- travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom technical support (14 nodes), and insurance claims processing (55 nodes) -- we evaluate 200 conversations per condition using LLM-as-judge scoring on five quality criteria. The in-context approach scores 4.53--5.00 on a 5-point scale while a LangGraph orchestrator using the same model scores 4.17--4.84. The orchestrated system fails on 24% of travel, 9% of Zoom, and 17% of insurance conversations, compared to 11.5%, 0.5%, and 5% for the in-context baseline. While external orchestration may have been necessary for earlier models, advances in frontier model capabilities have made it unnecessary for multi-turn conversations following a defined procedure.
2604.27891.paper_summary_zh: 代理協調框架 -- LangGraph、CrewAI、Google ADK、OpenAI Agents SDK 等 -- 在大型語言模型 (LLM) 之上放置一個外部協調器，隨時跟蹤狀態並注入路由指令。<lb/>我們呈現了一個受控比較，顯示對於程序性任務，這種架構被一個更簡單的替代方案所主導：將整個程序放入系統提示中，讓模型自我協調。<lb/>在三個領域 -- 旅行訂票 (14 個節點)、Zoom 技術支援 (14 個節點) 和保險索賠處理 (55 個節點) -- 我們評估了每個條件下的 200 次對話，使用 LLM 作為評判者，根據五個質量標準進行打分。<lb/>在情境內的方法在 5 分制上得分 4.53--5.00，而使用相同模型的 LangGraph 協調器得分為 4.17--4.84。<lb/>與情境基準相比，協調系統在 24% 的旅行、9% 的 Zoom 和 17% 的保險對話中失敗，而情境基準的失敗率分別為 11.5%、0.5% 和 5%。<lb/>雖然對於早期模型來說，外部協調可能是必要的，但前沿模型能力的進步使得在遵循定義程序的多輪對話中不再需要它。
2604.27891.author: Simon Dennis et.al.
2604.27891.authors: Simon Dennis, Michael Diamond, Rivaan Patil, Kevin Shabahang, Hao Guo
